reasoning: The mean daily temperature in Bourges in late October (Oct 26) is approximately 10.5°C, while in late January (Jan 24) it is roughly 3.8°C. Assuming normal distributions with standard deviations of ~3°C and ~3.5°C respective to each month, the distribution of the difference (Jan - Oct) has a mean of -6.7°C and a standard deviation of ~4.6°C. The probability of January 24 being warmer than October 26 is the probability that this difference exceeds 0, corresponding to a Z-score of about 1.45. This yields a predicted probability of roughly 7-8%. Given the absence of a specific list of multiple dates, this estimate assumes the question's close date of January 24, 2026, serves as the target resolution date.
